proposed_operating_metrics.evidence_source: labor transaction log + supervisor correction approval

gate_control_metrics.name: RFQ Turnaround Time
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: RFQ phản hồi ≤ 4 giờ làm việc trước khi chuyển sang bước báo giá (CDR A1).

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ báo giá phải hiệu chỉnh sau khi gửi
counter_metric.name: Quote rework rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc rút ngắn thời gian báo giá bằng cách bỏ bước rà soát, sai phải sửa lại.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Epicor Quote record, RFQ completeness checklist, timestamped CS response log
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold G0 quote release when complete RFQ response exceeds 4 working hours or RFQ evidence is incomplete; CS must open recovery action before quote handoff.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Hold G0 quote handoff; CS escalates to CS-Lead nếu vượt 4h.

thresholds.basis: Gate G0 — CDR A1: RFQ response ≤ 4 working hours; >8h drift makes gate fail and blocks quote handoff.

gate_control_metrics.name: Contract Review FTR
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: ≥95% đơn hàng qua soát xét hợp đồng đúng lần đầu trước khi chấp thuận đơn (CDR A2/A5).

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ đơn hàng bị thay đổi điều khoản sau khi đã xác nhận
counter_metric.name: Post-confirmation order change rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc soát xét đơn hàng hời hợt để đạt RFT, sai sót lộ ra sau xác nhận.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-202 contract review record with approved customer requirement traceability
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold order acceptance when contract review is not right-first-time or A2/A5 evidence is missing; CS resolves with EST/QA before G1 handoff.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Hold order acceptance; CS + EST + QA recheck before G1 handoff.

thresholds.basis: Gate G0 — CDR A2/A5: ≥95% orders right-first-time at contract review; <90% blocks acceptance gate.

gate_control_metrics.name: Engineering First-Time-Right
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: ≥95% gói nền phát hành đúng lần đầu sau DFM, không phải mở lại (CDR B1/B2).

thresholds.basis: Phát hành kỹ thuật đúng lần đầu chuẩn ≥95%.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số vòng sửa bản vẽ sau lần phát hành đầu tiên
counter_metric.name: Drawing rework loop count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc đạt phát hành lần đầu bằng cách bỏ bước rà soát, phải sửa nhiều vòng.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-306 engineering release pack, revision log, DFM/CAM/routing approval evidence
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold baseline release when engineering package must be reopened or B1/B2 approval evidence is missing; ENGM chairs containment before production planning.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Hold engineering release; ENGM gates revised baseline before G2.

gate_control_metrics.name: ECN Lead Time
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Lệnh thay đổi kỹ thuật (ECO) xử lý ≤ 48 giờ (CDR B3).

thresholds.basis: ECO xử lý ≤48 giờ; >96 giờ là tồn đọng kỹ thuật.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ ECN ban hành thiếu đánh giá tác động đầy đủ
counter_metric.name: Impact-incomplete ECN rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc rút ngắn thời gian ECN bằng cách bỏ qua đánh giá tác động.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Epicor ECO/ECN record with submission, approval, implementation, and closure timestamps
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold affected revision release when ECO exceeds 48 hours or impact assessment is incomplete; ENGM escalates to PD/QA for priority decision.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate stale ECN; ENGM + PD reprioritize hoặc cap WIP exposure.

gate_control_metrics.name: Control Plan / PFMEA Approval Before Baseline
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% gói nền có Control Plan và PFMEA được phê duyệt TRƯỚC khi phát hành (CDR B8 — mới).

thresholds.basis: Control Plan + PFMEA duyệt trước phát hành — chuẩn 100%.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lỗi quá trình thoát ra do control plan / PFMEA duyệt hình thức
counter_metric.name: Process-escape from rubber-stamped control plan
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc duyệt control plan / PFMEA cho kịp baseline mà không rà soát thực chất.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Control Plan, PFMEA, and job_orders.control_plan_id approval evidence linked to baseline release
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: No G1 release when Control Plan/PFMEA is absent or unapproved; QA blocks baseline until B8 evidence is complete.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Block G2 advance; QA + ENGM force PFMEA / control-plan signoff.

gate_control_metrics.name: IQC Pass Rate
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: ≥99% lô vật tư mua vào đạt kiểm tra đầu vào trước khi nhập kho (CDR D10).

thresholds.basis: IQC pass rate ≥99% trước khi nhập kho.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lô vật tư lỗi lọt vào sản xuất sau khi IQC đã cho qua
counter_metric.name: Post-IQC defective-lot leakage
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc nâng tỷ lệ IQC đạt bằng cách nới tiêu chí kiểm tra đầu vào.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-701 receiving/IQC record with lot, certificate, disposition, and inspector signature
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold G2 material readiness when IQC lot is rejected, open, or lacks D10 evidence; QA/SCM decide quarantine, concession, or replacement.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Hold material release; QA reject / SCAR theo D10; SCM open SCAR/quarantine.

gate_control_metrics.name: Traceability Completeness
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% lô nhập có chứng chỉ truy xuất nguồn gốc đối chiếu đầy đủ (CDR D10).

thresholds.basis: Truy xuất nguồn gốc lô nhập đầy đủ — chuẩn 100%.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ truy vết thất bại khi tra cứu thực tế dù hồ sơ khai đủ
counter_metric.name: Failed-drill traceability rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc khai hồ sơ truy xuất đầy đủ trong khi không tra ngược được khi cần.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Epicor receipt, lot trace, mill certificate, CoC, and material certificate match evidence
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold material issue to production when certificate/lot trace is incomplete; SCM resolves before G3 setup release.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Hold kit release; SCM force mill-cert / batch trace completion.

gate_control_metrics.name: Setup First-Pass Success
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: ≥95% lần cài đặt đạt ngay sau pilot/dry-run, không phải lặp (CDR B5/B6).

thresholds.basis: Cài đặt đạt ngay lần đầu chuẩn ≥95%.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lần phải chỉnh lại máy giữa loạt sau khi setup đã nghiệm thu
counter_metric.name: Mid-run re-adjustment count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc khai setup đạt lần đầu trong khi phải chỉnh lại nhiều lần khi chạy.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-511 setup readiness, dry-run/pilot result, fixture/gage readiness, and first setup approval
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold production run when setup does not pass first attempt or B5/B6 evidence is incomplete; WKM/QA review before releasing lot.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Hold setup acceptance; WKM rework setup before lot start.

gate_control_metrics.name: Changeover Time
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Thời gian chuyển công đoạn được đo và kiểm soát theo chuẩn SMED (CDR C4).

thresholds.basis: Thời gian chuyển công đoạn theo chuẩn SMED ≤30 phút.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ mẻ đầu sau đổi mẫu bị lỗi
counter_metric.name: First-piece-after-changeover defect rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc rút ngắn thời gian đổi mẫu bằng cách làm ẩu, mẻ đầu bị lỗi.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Time Entry setup/changeover record with SMED reason codes and work-center timestamp
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Escalate G3 when changeover exceeds standard or lacks reason code; WKM protects constraint resources and updates recovery action.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate slow changeover; WKM root-cause + reset standard work.

gate_control_metrics.name: FAI First-Pass Rate
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: ≥98% mẫu đầu/FAI đạt ngay lần kiểm đầu tiên trước khi nhả loạt (CDR D1/D2). Cùng mã canonical với KPI value-stream FAI_FIRST_PASS.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ lỗi lọt xuống loạt sản xuất sau khi FAI đã đạt
counter_metric.name: Post-FAI production defect leakage
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc nới tiêu chí FAI để đạt lần đầu, lỗi xuất hiện khi vào loạt.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-311 FAI/first-piece inspection record, inspection result, attempt number, and QA approval
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: No G4 lot release when FAI fails first pass or D1/D2 evidence is incomplete; QA holds production and opens NCR/rework decision.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: No lot release; QA holds production, opens NCR/rework decision (CDR D1/D2).

thresholds.basis: Gate G4 — CDR D1/D2: ≥98% FAI first-pass before lot release; <90% blocks production and forces NCR/rework decision.

gate_control_metrics.name: FAI Cycle Time
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Chu kỳ kiểm FAI ≤ 2 giờ; hồ sơ FAI/PPAP nộp khách đúng hạn (CDR D1/D12).

thresholds.basis: Chu kỳ kiểm FAI ≤2 giờ.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số bước kiểm FAI bị bỏ qua để rút ngắn thời gian
counter_metric.name: Skipped FAI inspection steps
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc rút ngắn chu kỳ FAI bằng cách bỏ bớt bước kiểm bắt buộc.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-311 FAI start/finish timestamp, PPAP/customer submission log, and CMM/gage queue evidence
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Escalate when FAI cycle exceeds 2 hours or PPAP package is late; QA/QCL assigns recovery before production release.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate FAI delay; QA + PD reschedule downstream slot.

gate_control_metrics.name: In-Process Rejection Rate
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Tỷ lệ loại trong quá trình ≤ 1%; vượt ngưỡng phải mở NCR (CDR D3).

thresholds.basis: Tỷ lệ loại trong quá trình ≤1%.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lần nới tiêu chí kiểm trong chuyền không có phê duyệt
counter_metric.name: Unauthorized in-line criteria relaxation count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc ép tỷ lệ loại trong chuyền xuống bằng cách tự nới tiêu chí kiểm.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-651 IPQC/NCR record with defect quantity, operation, containment, and disposition
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold affected operation when reject rate exceeds 1% or D3 evidence is missing; WKM opens containment and QA decides NCR/CAPA path.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Hold production line; WKM + QA stop-the-line + IPQC reaction.

gate_control_metrics.name: SPC Signal Reaction Time
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Phản ứng tín hiệu SPC ≤ 15 phút trước khi xử lý NCR (CDR D3/D4).

thresholds.basis: Phản ứng tín hiệu SPC ≤15 phút.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ tín hiệu SPC tái phát sau khi đã đóng
counter_metric.name: Recurring SPC signal rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc đóng tín hiệu SPC nhanh mà không hành động, tín hiệu lặp lại.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-631 SPC chart signal log with detection timestamp, reaction timestamp, and containment action
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Stop or hold process when SPC reaction exceeds 15 minutes; WKM/QA must verify containment before continuing production.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate to QA; force operator stop-the-line + supervisor intervene.

gate_control_metrics.name: Release Package Completeness
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% gói phát hành/CoC đầy đủ trước khi ký kiểm cuối (CDR D8).

thresholds.basis: Gói phát hành/CoC đầy đủ — chuẩn 100%.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ bộ hồ sơ giao đủ đầu mục nhưng sai nội dung
counter_metric.name: Complete-but-wrong shipping packet rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc khai bộ hồ sơ giao đầy đủ trong khi nội dung tài liệu sai.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-642 final release/ship packet checklist, CoC, label, traceability, and QA signoff
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: No G6 final release when ship packet is incomplete; QA blocks shipment until D8 evidence is complete.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Block shipment; QA forces packet completion before CoC release.

gate_control_metrics.name: Traceability Drill Time
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Truy xuất ngược một lô bất kỳ ≤ 60 giây khi diễn tập (CDR D8).

thresholds.basis: Truy xuất ngược một lô ≤60 giây khi diễn tập.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ diễn tập truy xuất hoàn tất nhanh nhưng dữ liệu không đầy đủ
counter_metric.name: Fast-but-incomplete drill rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc rút ngắn thời gian diễn tập truy xuất bằng cách bỏ sót dữ liệu.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Traceability drill log with sampled lot, reverse lookup timestamps, evidence links, and QA witness
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Escalate management review when drill exceeds 60 seconds or cannot prove traceability; QA/QMS opens corrective action.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate drill failure; QA + SCM corrective trace + re-drill.

gate_control_metrics.name: On-Time Delivery (gate view)
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: ≥95% lô dỡ chặn giao hàng và giao đúng cam kết (CDR D7). Cùng mã canonical với KPI công ty OTD.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ lô phải giao gấp hoặc giao thiếu để kịp hạn
counter_metric.name: Expedited or short-shipment rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc ép OTD bằng cách giao gấp tốn chi phí hoặc giao thiếu số lượng.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Epicor Ship record, approved promise date, PackID, release status, and customer delivery evidence
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Escalate G7 recovery when shipment risks missing approved promise date; SCM/PD decide recovery, partial shipment, or customer communication.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate delivery risk; SCM + PD recovery; CS notifies customer per D7.

thresholds.basis: Gate G7 — CDR D7: ≥95% shipments meet promise date; <90% triggers SCM/PD recovery and customer communication.

gate_control_metrics.name: Ship-to-Invoice Turnaround
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Thời gian từ phát hành/giao đến xuất hóa đơn ≤ 24 giờ (CDR D8). Cùng mã canonical với KPI value-stream SHIP_READY_TO_INVOICE_LT.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ hóa đơn sai phải phát hành lại
counter_metric.name: Invoice reissue rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc rút ngắn thời gian xuất hóa đơn bằng cách bỏ bước kiểm, hóa đơn sai.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Epicor AR invoice request, ship release timestamp, invoice creation timestamp, and APAR/FIN review evidence
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Escalate billing handoff when ship-to-invoice exceeds 24 hours or D8 pack is mismatched; FIN closes discrepancy before invoice release.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate billing delay; FIN closes discrepancy before invoice release.

thresholds.basis: Gate G7 — CDR D8: ≤24h ship-to-invoice; >48h forces FIN to close discrepancy before invoice release.

gate_control_metrics.name: Customer Escape Notification Lead Time
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Thông báo khách ≤ 24 giờ kể từ khi phát hiện sản phẩm không phù hợp đã hoặc có thể đã giao (CDR D11 — mới).
gate_control_metrics.data_source: FRM khiếu nại + sổ thông báo khách

thresholds.basis: Thông báo khách ≤24 giờ kể từ khi phát hiện sản phẩm không phù hợp.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ thông báo escape gửi khách khi chưa đủ thông tin containment
counter_metric.name: Premature escape-notification rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc báo khách nhanh để đạt mốc nhưng thông tin khoanh vùng chưa đủ.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Customer complaint/escape log, notification timestamp, containment record, and customer communication evidence
gate_control_metrics.owner_alignment_note: RACI D11 A=CS owns customer-facing message; QA owns detection clock + gate evidence + SLA enforcement; CEO escalation per spec §8
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Block reward and open containment when customer escape notification exceeds 24 hours; QA/CS must notify customer and record action.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Notify customer immediately + open containment; QA escalates CEO if >24h or containment incomplete.
gate_control_metrics.start_clock_basis: Đồng hồ bắt đầu tại thời điểm QA xác nhận sản phẩm không phù hợp ĐÃ giao hoặc CÓ THỂ đã giao (detection_time), KHÔNG phải tại NCR creation hoặc customer reply. Mọi chậm trễ giữa detection_time và customer notification phải có justification trong FRM-211.
gate_control_metrics.containment_basis: Notification phải đính kèm containment evidence: scope lô bị ảnh hưởng, hold/recall decision, traceability list. Notify-without-containment = premature, đếm vào counter.

escalation.sla_basis: RACI §8.1 P0 escalation — CDR D11 sự cố P0.

additional_counter_metrics.name_vi: Tỷ lệ escape phát hiện muộn / bị suppress khỏi sổ thông báo
additional_counter_metrics.name: Late or suppressed escape logging rate
additional_counter_metrics.intent: Bắt việc giữ con số notification_LT đẹp bằng cách ghi nhận escape muộn hoặc không ghi vào sổ thông báo khách (detection_time bị đẩy lùi).

gate_control_metrics.name: Cost of Poor Quality
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Chi phí chất lượng kém ≤ 2% doanh thu, gộp NCR/CAPA/phế phẩm mọi cổng (CDR D3/D5/D9).

thresholds.basis: Chi phí chất lượng kém ≤2% doanh thu.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ chi phí lỗi thực tế không được ghi nhận vào COPQ
counter_metric.name: Unrecorded poor-quality cost rate
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc báo COPQ thấp bằng cách không ghi nhận đủ chi phí lỗi phát sinh.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Epicor cost buckets, NCR/CAPA/rework/scrap records, finance close evidence, and COPQ worksheet
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Escalate monthly QMS/finance review when COPQ exceeds 2% revenue or cost evidence is incomplete; QA/FIN assign CAPA or cost model correction.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate COPQ spike; QA + PD open CAPA, finance freezes overrun.

gate_control_metrics.name: First Pass Yield
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Hiệu suất đạt ngay lần đầu ≥ 98%, gộp FAI và kiểm trong quá trình (CDR D1/D3).

thresholds.basis: Hiệu suất đạt ngay lần đầu ≥98%.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lần kiểm lại / sửa trước khi tính điểm yield lần đầu
counter_metric.name: Pre-count rework pass count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc thổi FPY bằng cách sửa và kiểm lại trước khi ghi nhận yield lần đầu.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: FRM-651 first-pass inspection population, rework/reinspection flags, FAI/IPQC records, and NCR links
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Escalate quality-at-source review when FPY falls below 98% or inspection bypass is suspected; QA/WKM contain affected product before release.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate FPY drop; QA + WKM open SPC / NCR review; PD adjusts release rules.

gate_control_metrics.name: Overall Equipment Effectiveness
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Hiệu suất thiết bị tổng thể ≥ 85% qua các cổng sản xuất (CDR C4/C7).
gate_control_metrics.data_source: mes_oee_snapshots (migration 025_mes_tables.sql); KpiEngine::calcOee aggregates planned_production_time_sec / actual_run_time_sec / downtime_sec / setup_time_sec / good_pieces / total_pieces / ideal_cycle_time_sec.

thresholds.basis: OEE ≥85% — chuẩn world-class.

counter_metric.name_vi: Tỷ lệ giờ máy nút thắt bị bỏ trống trong khi chạy máy không nút thắt
counter_metric.name: Constraint idle while non-constraint runs
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc làm đẹp OEE bằng cách chạy máy không phải nút thắt, để nút thắt đói việc.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Prove gate pass/fail, trigger hold/release, and open escalation before downstream work continues.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: Epicor MES machine state, production count, planned time, downtime reason tree, and work-center context
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Escalate TOC review when OEE loss hits constraint or lacks reason code; WKM/MNT protect constraint and update recovery action.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Escalate OEE drop; WKM + ENG-EQ open downtime / changeover Pareto.

gate_control_metrics.name: Customer Requirement Profile Assigned
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Mỗi đơn hàng có hồ sơ yêu cầu khách hàng được gán
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% đơn hàng có active_profile_code đã gán + actor + acked_at trước khi release G1; khách LAM/SEMSYSCO không được rơi vào default ngầm.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số đơn LAM/SEMSYSCO bị rơi vào default profile ngầm
counter_metric.name: Silent-default LAM/SEMSYSCO orders
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc bỏ qua bước gán profile cho khách bán dẫn → áp sai bộ yêu cầu chất lượng.

thresholds.basis: LAM_SEMSYSCO profile bắt buộc explicit; silent_default_forbidden=true.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Gate G1 release on explicit customer profile assignment; hold order otherwise.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: customer_requirement_profile_assignment_event log + signed CS acknowledgement
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold G1 release if any LAM/SEMSYSCO order lacks active_profile_code or actor signature; CS must complete assignment before order release.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Block G1 release; CS re-assigns profile theo CDR A2/A5 trước khi engineering nhận.

gate_control_metrics.name: Customer-Specific Requirement Acknowledgement Rate
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Tỷ lệ xác nhận yêu cầu riêng của khách trước khi release đơn
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% LAM/SEMSYSCO orders có CSR revision hiện hành được ack (signature + date) trước G1 release.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số đơn release trước khi ack CSR revision mới nhất
counter_metric.name: CSR-acknowledgement-skip count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc release đơn khi CSR revision mới chưa được ack — rủi ro non-compliance ở G7.

thresholds.basis: LAM yêu cầu CSR ack explicit; mọi miss đều mở rủi ro escape.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Block G1 release until CSR ack recorded.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: csr_acknowledgement_log + signed CSR letter PDF on shared evidence storage
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold G1 release until CSR ack present and current revision; QA + CS co-sign.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Hold customer reply gate; CS + QA confirm CSR acknowledgement before G1.

gate_control_metrics.name: RFQ Feasibility Study Completeness
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Mức đầy đủ của nghiên cứu khả thi RFQ
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: ≥98% RFQ feasibility checklist (manufacturability, material, tolerance, law, processability, sub-supplier) hoàn tất trước khi báo giá đi.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số RFQ bị mở lại sau khi báo giá do thiếu feasibility
counter_metric.name: Post-quote feasibility rework count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc chốt RFQ nhanh mà bỏ feasibility — lộ ra ở khâu DFM hoặc FAI.

thresholds.basis: LAM/SEMSYSCO feasibility là tiền đề zero-defect; below 90% là tín hiệu commercial chạy ẩu.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Block quote handoff until feasibility checklist complete.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: rfq_feasibility_checklist signed by EST + DFM
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold quote release until checklist complete; EST owns; DFM reviews critical items.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Block quote handoff; EST + ENGM complete feasibility study trước báo giá.

gate_control_metrics.name: Inspection Plan Completeness
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Mức đầy đủ của kế hoạch kiểm tra
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% sản phẩm có inspection plan tài liệu hóa: đặc tính, thiết bị, thông số, sampling, người duyệt.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lô release mà inspection plan thiếu chỉ tiêu CTQ
counter_metric.name: CTQ-missing inspection-plan release count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc release lô khi plan thiếu đặc tính trọng yếu.

thresholds.basis: LAM yêu cầu plan đầy đủ trước G2 — thiếu = gate fail.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Hold G2 release until inspection plan complete.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: inspection_plan with QA signature + revision history
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold G2 until plan complete; QA approves; QE drafts.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Block G2 release; QA forces inspection-plan completion before material call-off.

gate_control_metrics.name: Check-Dimension Report Attached to Shipment
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Báo cáo kiểm thông số kích thước đính kèm lô hàng
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% lô hàng yêu cầu CDR (đánh dấu trên drawing/PO) có CDR đính kèm trước ship: part_name, part_number, serial nếu có, qty kiểm, check_dim_number, thiết bị dùng, tolerance, giá trị đo, ngày kiểm, người kiểm.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lô bị khách phát hiện thiếu CDR sau giao
counter_metric.name: CDR-missing customer-detected count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc giao lô khi CDR bị bỏ sót, khách trả lại.

thresholds.basis: LAM hợp đồng phổ biến yêu cầu CDR; 1 lô thiếu là 1 lần escape.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Hold G6/G7 ship release when CDR required and missing.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: check_dimension_report PDF + shipment evidence pack
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold ship release until CDR present + inspector signature; CPS verifies in packing line.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Block CoC; QA produces final dim-check before shipment.

gate_control_metrics.name: Gage Valid for Release
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Thiết bị đo hợp lệ khi dùng phát hành
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% phát hành kiểm tra dùng gage còn hiệu chuẩn / đúng phạm vi / có status mark / không hết hạn / không hỏng. Vi phạm = release invalid + CAPA + thông báo khách (nếu LAM).

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lần dùng gage hết hạn / không phù hợp cho release
counter_metric.name: Expired-or-unsuitable gage release count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc release với gage không hợp lệ — release coi như invalid.

thresholds.basis: LAM zero-tolerance đối với expired gauge; 1 lần = 1 CAPA + thông báo.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Invalidate release decisions made with non-conforming gage; mandate CAPA.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: calibration_records (last cal date) + gage_usage_log linked to inspection event
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Block release if gage status invalid; pull and re-measure with valid gage; LAM customers notified per profile.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Block FAI signoff; MCS revalidates gage hoặc swap before FAI release.

gate_control_metrics.name: Process Change Approval Before Implementation
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Tỷ lệ thay đổi quá trình được duyệt trước khi áp dụng
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% product/process change đối với LAM PN có change-approval letter + báo cáo khách (PPAP-like) TRƯỚC khi chạy lô đầu tiên.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số change đã áp dụng cho LAM PN nhưng chưa có approval letter
counter_metric.name: Unapproved LAM-PN process-change count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc tự ý đổi quy trình mà chưa có duyệt → vi phạm hợp đồng + rủi ro recall.

thresholds.basis: LAM/SEMSYSCO zero-tolerance: 1 unapproved change = recall risk + corrective.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Hard-block any LAM-PN production using unapproved process change.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: customer_approval_letter PDF linked from process_change_request
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold G1 production release if change exists without approval letter; ENGM + QA co-sign.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Hold ECO release; ENGM forces approval evidence trước khi vào sản xuất.

gate_control_metrics.name: Written Special Release Before Delivery
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Phát hành đặc cách có văn bản trước khi giao
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% lô giao có deviation/non-conformance phải có written special release letter từ khách TRƯỚC khi ship. Verbal acceptance = invalid.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lô giao có deviation mà thiếu written special release
counter_metric.name: Deviated-ship without written release count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc giao lô lệch quy cách dựa trên ack miệng — khách có thể từ chối, mở complaint.

thresholds.basis: LAM/SEMSYSCO yêu cầu written; 1 lần thiếu = hold + escalate.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Hard-block delivery of deviated lots without written customer release.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: special_release_letter PDF + customer countersignature
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold G7 ship release until written letter present; CS coordinates with customer; QA validates content matches deviation.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Block special-release shipment; QA + CS validate full evidence per CDR D11.

gate_control_metrics.name: Special-Release Load Carrier Marking
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Đánh dấu thùng/đóng gói khi giao theo special release
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: 100% lô giao theo special release có marking phụ trên load carrier (per LAM spec).

counter_metric.name_vi: Số lô special release giao thiếu marking phụ
counter_metric.name: Special-release ship without extra marking count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc giao đặc cách mà thiếu marking — khách không nhận diện được lô đặc biệt khi nhập kho.

thresholds.basis: Marking phụ là evidence khách yêu cầu; thiếu = vi phạm clause hợp đồng.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Hold ship until marking present on every load carrier in the deviated lot.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: shipment_marking_evidence photos + CPS sign-off
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Hold ship release until photo evidence shows marking on every load carrier; CPS attests.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Block shipment label; CPS re-marks special release per customer spec.

gate_control_metrics.name: Customer-Supplied Gage Damage/Unsuitable Notification Lead Time
gate_control_metrics.name_vi: Thời gian thông báo khi gage do khách cấp bị hỏng / không phù hợp
gate_control_metrics.gate_pass_condition: Thông báo khách ≤ 24 giờ kể từ khi phát hiện gage SEMSYSCO/LAM cấp bị hỏng hoặc không phù hợp; có incident record + email khách.

counter_metric.name_vi: Số sự cố gage khách cấp bị che giấu hoặc thông báo trễ
counter_metric.name: Suppressed customer-gage incident count
counter_metric.intent: Bắt việc che giấu sự cố gage để tránh hậu quả — khách yêu cầu transparency.

thresholds.basis: LAM clause: gage incident notification within 24h.

gate_control_metrics.decision_purpose: Trigger immediate customer notification + escalation; CAPA mandatory.
gate_control_metrics.evidence_source: customer_gage_incident_log + outbound email evidence
gate_control_metrics.hold_release_rule: Open incident, notify within 24h, retain gage in protective state pending customer instruction; further use of suspect gage blocked.
gate_control_metrics.cdr_review_note: Currently linked D11 (quality escape). Consider re-binding to E7 (customer property exception). Defer per P06.1.
gate_control_metrics.decision_action: Notify customer immediately on gage damage; QA + CS escalate per D11.

document_audit.interpretation: The estate has broad KPI language, but only ANNEX-122 governance KPIs, ANNEX-110 dashboard KPIs, gate metrics, runtime metrics, and explicitly approved operational metrics are controlled KPI authority.

performance_governance_audit.interpretation: This is a conservative control audit. Missing local people-governance terms means the document must either rely on ANNEX-127 performance governance or rename the item to operating metric, control metric, gate metric, role measure, or health indicator.

role_measure_policy.rule: JD measures support performance review and OJT but are not official enterprise KPIs unless mapped to this registry.

performance_governance_policy.naming_rule: A measurement may be called KPI only when it has an approved evaluation use. If it is not used for evaluation, call it operating metric, control metric, gate metric, role performance measure, or health indicator.

classification_rule.kpi: Used in a formal scorecard or performance review with owner, cadence, target, evidence, rating method, recognition rule, and corrective-action rule.
classification_rule.operating_metric: Used for shift/day/week control and escalation; may trigger action but not direct reward or discipline.
classification_rule.gate_control_metric: Used to hold/release work, certify readiness, or prove QMS/MES evidence; discipline only applies to verified bypass, falsification, or repeated non-compliance.
classification_rule.role_performance_measure: Used in JD, OJT, competency, or review of role execution; not an enterprise KPI unless mapped to this registry.
classification_rule.health_indicator: Monitored for awareness or trend review; no rating, reward, or discipline.

performance_governance_policy.recognition_rule: Recognition can be monetary or non-monetary, individual or team based, but must use a balanced bundle of controllable measures. Do not reward one metric alone when safety, quality, delivery, or data integrity is weak.
performance_governance_policy.corrective_action_rule: Below-target performance triggers review, coaching, root cause, CAPA, resource escalation, training, or process redesign before any people discipline.
performance_governance_policy.discipline_guardrail: Discipline is allowed only for verified controllable behavior: data falsification, bypassing a required gate, unsafe act, repeated non-compliance after coaching, or refusal to follow a released procedure. Do not punish an uncontrollable outcome caused by material shortage, customer change, machine failure, engineering defect, or management resource decision.
performance_governance_policy.anti_gaming_guardrail: Every KPI used for reward or discipline must have a counter-metric or gate: safety, quality escape, customer impact, evidence integrity, and supervisor/QA review.

reward_rules.source: P07 fair-reward + ANNEX-127/-129; anti-gaming risk register §2.
reward_rules.rule_1_red_kpi_never_individual_punish: A red KPI does NOT automatically trigger individual discipline. Red opens root cause, containment, CAPA/kaizen, training, and resource review before any people decision.
reward_rules.rule_2_red_triggers_improvement_loop: Red MUST open a root-cause + containment + (CAPA or kaizen) + training-or-resource review record before any reward/discipline conversation about the period.
reward_rules.rule_3_recognition_requires_balanced_bun: Recognition (monetary or non-monetary) is decided on a balanced bundle of controllable measures, never a single KPI. A bundle MUST include at least one delivery, one quality, one safety/data-integrity counter, evaluated together.
reward_rules.rule_4_blockers_freeze_recognition: Any open blocker — verified safety incident, customer escape without containment, data-integrity finding, verified gate bypass, audit major non-conformance — FREEZES all monetary recognition for the period regardless of green KPI scores. See blocking_condition_registry.
reward_rules.rule_5_reward_eligibility_requirements: A metric can carry reward_mode ∈ (bonus_pool_candidate, team_reward_candidate, role_review_input) ONLY when ALL of: (a) owner controls majority of drivers OR attribution_rule splits cause fairly, (b) counter_metric exists, (c) evidence has audit trail, (d) calculation_status ≠ staged_data_contract, (e) min_sample is set if metric is a rate, (f) review/calibration cadence is defined.
reward_rules.rule_6_discipline_scope_whitelist: Discipline is allowed ONLY for verified controllable behaviour listed in discipline_scope (data falsification, gate bypass, unsafe act, repeated non-compliance after coaching, refusal to follow released procedure). All other red outcomes route to coaching/CAPA/resource review.

attribution_rule_template.purpose: Default attribution skeleton for any reward-eligible KPI; metric-level attribution_rule may override or refine. Owner-action and contributor-action MUST be separated before any reward/discipline conversation.
attribution_rule_template.owner_vs_contributor_rule: If breakdown attributes >50% of the red period to a non-owner axis, the owner is NOT individually penalised; the contributor role takes recovery action and the management review records the resource decision.

discipline_scope.rule: Discipline (formal warning, monetary deduction, role removal, termination) is allowed ONLY for these verified controllable behaviours. Anything else routes to coaching/CAPA/resource review.
discipline_scope.evidence_requirement: Discipline action MUST cite a specific blocker condition_id from blocking_condition_registry (gate_bypass / data_integrity / safety groups) plus a coaching or investigation record. No discipline on attribution-only outcome metrics.

metric_governance_schema.rule: Every catalog metric must expose intent, behavior motive, expected result, decision purpose, evaluation use, consequence guardrail, anti-gaming counter metric, and data-contract status. Official KPI means metric_type = kpi and evaluation_use is approved.

metric_control_schema_extension.purpose: Adds the wider axis enums required by the LAM/Semsysco pilot (control_intent, measurement_data_type, fine-grained scoring_model, evaluation_use, reward_mode, assignment_type, sample_policy, lifecycle_status). Fields are OPTIONAL per metric: legacy metrics without these attributes continue to validate. The Admin Console wizard sets them on new metrics and offers progressive enrichment on existing ones.
metric_control_schema_extension.back_compat_rule: Existing metric_types in metric_governance_schema (kpi, operating_metric, gate_control_metric, role_performance_measure, health_indicator) remain canonical. metric_subtype is a finer-grained classification under each metric_type and never replaces metric_type. calculation_status remains the SSOT for runtime/staged/manual distinction; lifecycle_status is an orthogonal lifecycle axis (draft → pilot → active → frozen → deprecated → retired).

sample_policy_levels.insufficient: n < 25 — display insufficient_data; do not score; do not display Cpk numerically
sample_policy_levels.provisional: 25 <= n < 50 — score provisionally with a 'provisional' badge; not eligible for reward
sample_policy_levels.internal: 50 <= n < 100 — internal scoring permitted; not yet customer-grade
sample_policy_levels.customer_grade: n >= 100 — full scoring + customer-facing capability claim permitted

legacy_evaluation_use_map._note: Pre-MCS-EXT-1 gates declared evaluation_use with this long-form value to make 'no reward, no discipline' loud. It is accepted as a canonical-equivalent of gate_hold_release for backward compatibility. New metrics SHOULD use 'gate_hold_release'; a future cleanup pass may rename the 21 legacy gate rows.

reward_mode.guardrail: if reward_mode is bonus_pool_candidate or role_review_input or team_reward_candidate, calculation_status MUST be runtime_calculated

paired_metric.note: must resolve to another metric canonical_code (any section)

attribution_rule.note: free text describing how attribution is fair, e.g. 'rule:plan_adherence_breakdown_by_cause'

usage_contexts.items: free text or enum from evaluation_use

ci_enforcement_summary.p0_extension_consistency: When metric_subtype IS present, control_intent MUST be present. When scoring_model_detail IS present, it MUST be in scoring_model_by_metric_subtype[metric_subtype]. When sample_policy IS present, min_n_score MUST be numeric.
ci_enforcement_summary.p0_reward_mode_runtime_only: If reward_mode IN (bonus_pool_candidate, role_review_input, team_reward_candidate), calculation_status MUST be runtime_calculated (mirrors existing P0.7 reward_eligible gate).
ci_enforcement_summary.p1_legacy_metric_type_drift: Warn when metric_type is set but the corresponding legacy_metric_type_map[metric_type] differs from metric_subtype.

customer_requirement_profiles.rule: Customer-specific quality requirements are activated by profile, never globally. Every customer order must resolve to exactly one active profile: the customer master default, optionally overridden by PO/spec/part-family/order risk class. LAM/Semsysco customers MUST never be defaulted silently — assignment is recorded with actor + timestamp + acknowledgement.

STANDARD_INDUSTRIAL.profile_name_vi: Khách hàng CNC công nghiệp tiêu chuẩn (mặc định)

LAM_SEMSYSCO.profile_name: LAM Research / SEMSYSCO semiconductor QA profile
LAM_SEMSYSCO.profile_name_vi: Hồ sơ yêu cầu chất lượng bán dẫn LAM Research / SEMSYSCO
activation_flow: = active requirement profile recorded on job_order.active_profile_code + actor + acked_at

metric_governance_defaults.rating_method: RAG plus owner review; use calibration before people consequence.
metric_governance_defaults.recognition_rule: Recognition is allowed only through a balanced bundle and confirmed evidence; never reward one metric while safety, quality, delivery, or data integrity is weak.
metric_governance_defaults.corrective_action_rule: Below-target result triggers owner review, action log, root cause, CAPA/kaizen, training, or resource escalation before people discipline.
metric_governance_defaults.discipline_guardrail: No direct discipline from an outcome metric. Discipline requires verified controllable behavior such as data falsification, bypassing a required gate, unsafe act, repeated non-compliance after coaching, or refusal to follow a released procedure.
metric_governance_defaults.anti_gaming_guardrail: Every rewardable KPI must be paired with a counter-metric or gate for safety, quality escape, customer impact, evidence integrity, and supervisor/QA review.
metric_governance_defaults.controllability_scope: Shared system outcome unless a documented event proves an individual's controllable behavior.

scorecard_operating_model.cadence: monthly scorecard, quarterly calibration, annual Hoshin refresh

rating_scale.meaning: Above target with clean evidence and no counter-metric breach.
Within tolerance but requires owner action.
Outside tolerance; requires containment, RCA, CAPA or resource review.
Safety, data integrity, customer escape, or gate bypass blocks recognition regardless of numeric result.

company_score_bands.action: eligible for calibrated recognition and standardization of best practice
management review action plan required before monetary recognition
no performance payout; resource review, RCA/CAPA or Hoshin adjustment required

reward_policy.eligibility_rule: Quarterly monetary/team recognition may be considered only when weighted score is at least 90, no current scorecard KPI is red, every yellow KPI has a closed owner action plan, every scorecard metric has approved runtime or manual-governed evidence, and no blocking condition is open.
reward_policy.score_cap_rule: If any current scorecard KPI is red, cap company score at yellow for management review and block monetary recognition. Candidate, staged, safety, data-integrity, customer-escape, or gate-bypass blockers override the numeric score.

recognition_bands.recognition: full team recognition pool after HR/QMS/CEO calibration
partial team recognition pool after calibration
kaizen resource priority or coaching acknowledgement only; no monetary performance recognition

reward_policy.calibration_rule: Final recognition and reward decisions require HR/QMS/CEO calibration. KPI output is an input, not an automatic payout or discipline engine.

executive_scorecard_items.rating_criteria: Measure shipped order lines or jobs against committed customer date after approved promise-date change control.
executive_scorecard_items.reward_rule: Eligible only when complaint rate, FPY and ship-packet counter-metrics are not red.
executive_scorecard_items.strategic_objective: Protect customer promise reliability without bypassing quality gates.
executive_scorecard_items.review_forum: monthly BSC; weekly delivery recovery when yellow/red

executive_scorecard_items.rating_criteria: Count confirmed customer complaints or escapes per 100 shipments; major escape is red regardless of rate.
executive_scorecard_items.reward_rule: Blocks quality/delivery recognition when containment or customer response is overdue.
executive_scorecard_items.strategic_objective: Expose customer escapes and force fast containment/CAPA.

executive_scorecard_items.rating_criteria: Count first-pass accepted units or operations using approved inspection population and no sampling bypass.
executive_scorecard_items.reward_rule: Eligible only when complaint rate, scrap and rework counter-metrics are not red.
executive_scorecard_items.strategic_objective: Increase right-first-time CNC flow before defects reach final release.

executive_scorecard_items.rating_criteria: Use finance-approved cost buckets for scrap, rework, concession, expedite and escape cost.
executive_scorecard_items.reward_rule: Eligible only when NCR rate is not being suppressed and repeat NCR is not red.
executive_scorecard_items.strategic_objective: Reduce poor-quality cost while keeping prevention/appraisal investment visible.

executive_scorecard_items.rating_criteria: Score PLAN_ADHERENCE from the approved registry formula and governed evidence source only.
executive_scorecard_items.reward_rule: Eligible only when PLAN_ADHERENCE-CTR is not red and no blocking condition is open.
executive_scorecard_items.strategic_objective: Stabilize dispatch and expose re-sequencing before delivery misses occur.

executive_scorecard_items.rating_criteria: Measure released jobs over approved aging threshold by work center, hold reason and owner.
executive_scorecard_items.reward_rule: Eligible only when WIP aging is not reset by move transactions without physical progress.
executive_scorecard_items.strategic_objective: Expose stuck WIP and unblock the true constraint instead of releasing more work.

executive_scorecard_items.rating_criteria: Score MATERIAL_AVAILABILITY_PLAN from the approved registry formula and governed evidence source only.
executive_scorecard_items.reward_rule: Eligible only when MATERIAL_AVAILABILITY_PLAN-CTR is not red and no blocking condition is open.
executive_scorecard_items.strategic_objective: Keep the approved plan executable with material and supplier readiness visible.
executive_scorecard_items.review_forum: daily plan readiness review; monthly BSC

scorecard_operating_model.design_rule: Keep the executive scorecard to seven scored core metrics. Put valuable leading, gate, TOC, LAM and capability indicators into strategic_driver_panel or gate_blockers until their evidence contract is approved and change-controlled.

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Prevent launch/setup defects before lot release.
strategic_driver_panel.review_forum: G4 gate review; daily quality tier
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; can cap/block recognition when gate evidence is missing or red

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Keep final release and ship evidence right the first time.
strategic_driver_panel.review_forum: G6 final release review; monthly quality review
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; red trend triggers QA containment and scorecard review

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Prevent the CMM/QC queue from starving delivery flow or hiding WIP.
strategic_driver_panel.review_forum: daily QC queue review; weekly TOC review
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; forces queue owner action when aging is red

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Improve the real constraint without optimizing non-constraint utilization.
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; cannot be used for payout until constraint binding and reason-code contract are approved

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Recover lost hours at the true constraint with reason-coded action.
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; red trend forces resource/CAPA review

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Prevent LAM shipment release without required dimensional evidence.
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; hard blocker for LAM scope when required CDR is missing

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Contain customer complaints quickly and protect 8D timing.
strategic_driver_panel.review_forum: customer complaint event review; monthly BSC risk panel
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; overdue response blocks customer-quality recognition

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Keep corrective action updates current until customer acceptance.
strategic_driver_panel.review_forum: customer complaint event review; monthly BSC risk panel

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Protect the plan from supplier quality and certificate readiness failures.
strategic_driver_panel.review_forum: daily plan readiness; supplier quality review
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; IQC/cert red blocks affected jobs from being counted as ready

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Keep certified backup coverage for critical roles and avoid single-person dependency.
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; red coverage triggers training/deputy action

strategic_driver_panel.strategic_objective: Expose supplier delivery/quality readiness before material availability fails.
strategic_driver_panel.review_forum: supplier quality review; monthly BSC risk panel
strategic_driver_panel.reward_policy: does_not_add_points; critical shortage or supplier escape can cap/block recognition

gate_blockers.label: Safety and serious near-miss open action
gate_blockers.strategic_objective: preserve non-tradeable safety and EHS action closure
gate_blockers.effect: blocks monetary/team recognition until containment and action closure are verified
gate_blockers.review_forum: EHS event review; monthly management review

gate_blockers.label: Customer escape without containment or 3D/8D discipline
gate_blockers.strategic_objective: protect customer trust by enforcing containment before recognition
gate_blockers.effect: blocks delivery/quality recognition for the affected scope until containment and customer communication are current

gate_blockers.label: Verified KPI, gate, or evidence falsification
gate_blockers.strategic_objective: protect audit integrity and prevent reward from false evidence
gate_blockers.initiative_link: data-integrity audit and e-signature evidence controls
gate_blockers.effect: blocks recognition and triggers audit/e-signature evidence review regardless of numeric result

gate_blockers.label: Required MOM/MES/QMS gate bypass
gate_blockers.strategic_objective: protect mandatory production and quality gates from bypass
gate_blockers.initiative_link: MOM/MES/QMS gate discipline and hold-release controls
gate_blockers.effect: blocks recognition for affected scope and forces hold/release escalation

gate_blockers.label: LAM/SEMSYSCO hard gate open
gate_blockers.strategic_objective: protect LAM release evidence before scope-specific recognition
gate_blockers.initiative_link: LAM G6/G7 check-dimension and special-release governance
gate_blockers.effect: blocks LAM-scope recognition until the hard gate evidence is complete and approved

scorecard_operating_model.rule: Only scored_core contributes to the company score. Strategic_driver_panel and gate_blockers guide action and can cap/block recognition, but do not add points unless promoted by approved data contract, registry change control, and post-pilot calibration.
scorecard_operating_model.pilot_reward_rule: During the 90-day pilot the model is simulation/calibration only. No monetary payout is authorized by this registry until BSC drift, LAM gates, Cpk/CTQ, customer NCR severity, and data evidence are proven and explicitly approved.

scorecard_layers.meaning: Seven small evidence-backed executive metrics; weights sum to 100 and drive the management score.
Visible leading/diagnostic metrics for action. They do not add score points while staged or manual-governed, but may cap/block recognition through the rule field.
Safety, customer escape, data integrity, gate bypass, and LAM hard gates override score arithmetic.

OTD.source_system: ERP shipping plus approved promise-date change control
OTD.source_table_or_record: shipments; com_order_promises or approved promise revision record
OTD.evidence_record: shipment record with frozen committed promise date and approved promise-date revision when changed
OTD.freshness_rule: monthly close; promise revisions approved before shipment is scored
OTD.lineage_rule: unapproved promise-date change blocks reward even when shipment is on revised date

COMPLAINT_RATE.source_system: EQMS customer complaint and escape lifecycle

backend_api_policy.rule: Calculation endpoints are allowed only for runtime_calculated_metrics after alias normalization. Known non-runtime metrics must return catalog coverage and data-contract status, not a fake value.

dashboard_render_contract.introduced: P08 — dashboard, tier-meeting, manual-input, admin UX
dashboard_render_contract.purpose: Every dashboard surface (executive, daily ops, gate, role/JD, data-contract backlog) reads the same governance fields per card. The UI MAY format them differently but it MUST NOT silently drop a required field — otherwise an operator sees a green number with no min_sample, no counter, no owner and acts on it as if it were a real KPI.

render_rules.staged_data_contract: Card MUST display 'chưa đủ data contract' badge + data_contract_gap text; numeric value field is SUPPRESSED (never render staged metric value as a real number). Only the badge, the data contract gap and the input endpoint are shown.
render_rules.data_contract_required: Same as staged — value SUPPRESSED, gap text rendered, badge 'chưa đủ data contract'.
render_rules.manual: Card MAY display the latest manual_input.value but MUST tag it 'nhập tay có kiểm soát' with input_status badge. Pending-review inputs MUST NOT contribute to reward calculation.
render_rules.manual_governed: Same as manual but counter_metric_status MUST be visible alongside the primary value.
render_rules.runtime_calculated: Card displays the numeric value with the unit. If breakdown.insufficient_data=true the card MUST render grey + insufficient_data_reason and the numeric value MUST be hidden.
render_rules.counter_metric_blocker: If primary KPI is green/yellow but counter_metric is red OR counter_metric is missing/pending, the card MUST show a counter-metric blocker badge and recognition/reward is blocked.

executive.staged_metric_policy: Executive scored cards are only scored_core metrics from CNC-EXEC-BSC-LEAN-7+DRIVERS-2026. Strategic drivers and gate blockers may be visible on the leadership page but must render as visible-only/cap/block cards and must not add points.

daily_ops.staged_metric_policy: Staged metric is shown ONLY as a watch-item with the badge, never with a number.

gate.staged_metric_policy: Staged gate metric blocks gate-pass; visible as red blocker even when there is no number.

role.audience: Per-JD scorecard card on role profile page
role.staged_metric_policy: Staged role measure is visible but reward contribution is DISABLED (scorecard_contributes_to_reward=false enforced).

backlog.staged_metric_policy: All cards are staged by definition. Each card MUST show data_contract_gap + target_graduation_condition + owner + estimated_data_ready_date if known.

strategic_driver.staged_metric_policy: Strategic drivers are visible for action and escalation only. They never add score points while staged/manual-governed; red/missing evidence may cap or block recognition under scorecard_operating_model.rule.

gate_blocker.audience: Tier-3 management / QMS gate blocker review
gate_blocker.staged_metric_policy: Gate blockers do not add points. Open blocker status blocks recognition for the affected scope even when all scored_core metrics are green.

manual_input_contract.introduced: P08 — dashboard, tier-meeting, manual-input, admin UX

validation.unit: string; if metric has thresholds.unit declared, input.unit MUST match (case-insensitive); empty unit is allowed and inherits metric.thresholds.unit
validation.cadence: metric.cadence MUST be one of daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly/ad_hoc; the input period length is informational, the engine does not reject mismatch (a CI WARN-only check)
validation.evidence_reference: free-form string (doc_code, NCR id, JO number, URL); WARN-only when blank for non-DRAFT input — DCC inspector may request it

reward_gate.policy: Only input_status='verified' (post-approval by a distinct approver, not the entered_by user) contributes to reward calculation. 'draft' and 'submitted' MAY render on the dashboard with a badge but MUST NOT count toward JD scorecard reward. 'superseded' rows are excluded from reward and from latest-input lookups. Note: 'verified' is the DB CHECK term; in governance language this state is equivalent to 'approved' — the approval workflow (POST /api/kpi/{metricCode}/input/approve) sets verified_by/verified_at and transitions submitted→verified after enforcing separation of duties (approver != entered_by).
reward_gate.enforcement_point: KpiEngine.calculateFromManualInput emits input_pending_review=true when status != 'verified'; dashboard renderer skips reward roll-up when input_pending_review=true. The DB CHECK constraint (migration 196) physically forbids any other status, so the engine never sees pending_review/approved/rejected — those are governance synonyms only.

threshold_schema.rag_logic_higher_is_better: GREEN if value>=green_point; YELLOW if value>=yellow_point; else RED
threshold_schema.rag_logic_lower_is_better: GREEN if value<=green_point; YELLOW if value<=yellow_point; else RED
threshold_schema.note: All threshold bounds are numeric so RAG status, gap (value-target), achievement (value/target), scorecard score and trend roll-up are computed arithmetically. Display strings are derived, never stored.

jd_kpi_scorecards.rule: Each JD carries a small active role-fit set plus candidate_bank, optional_rotate, and do_not_use lists. There is no fixed five-KPI rule; active count follows role complexity and evidence quality.
jd_kpi_scorecards.reward_policy: Role scorecards are evidence and coaching inputs only. They do not create automatic pay, discipline, or promotion decisions without HR/QMS/CEO calibration and blocker review.
jd_kpi_scorecards.role_performance_measures_note: These per-role scorecards are Role Performance Measures, not official company KPIs. Items have weights summing to ~100% within each role for coaching and review balance, but contributes_to_reward defaults to false. A role measure becomes monetary-reward eligible only after HR/QMS/CEO calibration AND blocker-clearance per performance_governance_policy.reward_rules.
jd_kpi_scorecards.data_contract_rule: A role measure may be active only when it maps to a governed canonical metric or a manual_governed role-performance metric with evidence_source and dedicated counter_code.
